result.stdout:
Adzup-Player CLI 1.0.9.0

Usage:

    adzup-player <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > help: Show command line help. Write ` adzup-player help <command> `
    > install: Install adzup-player.
    > run: Run adzup-player.
    > configure: Configure and register player to adzup server.
    > terminate: Terminate and shut down adzup-player.
    > update: update adzup-player.

To get a detailed help for a command:

    adzup-player help <command>
